name: Frozen Chocolate Mousse2
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a heavy pan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. In another bowl, whip cream, sugar, vanilla, and salt until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the chocolate mixture into the whipped cream.
6. Pour into parfait glasses and freeze for at least 2 hours before serving.
7. Remove from freezer about 30 minutes prior to serving.
